Milo Avidane  ·  President
About

Milo Avidane
Seadom Holdings Inc.

With over 35 years of hands-on leadership as the Owner and Operator of GSI Systems Inc., and having partnered with some of the largest and most respected mechanical contracting firms in the industry, Milo brings a proven track record in delivering high-performance HVAC solutions for New York City's most demanding commercial, industrial, and high-rise developments.

He specializes in the end-to-end management of multi-million dollar mechanical construction projects, earning a reputation for integrity, reliability, and technical precision — consistently exceeding expectations for corporate owners, building management firms, and general contractors.

  • ✦  Consulting & procurement strategies
  • ✦  Data Center HVAC installation
  • ✦  Team leadership & subcontractor management
  • ✦  HVAC design-build and plan/spec installations
  • ✦  Complex chilled water & high-efficiency retrofits
  • ✦  BMS/BAS & local controls integration & commissioning
  • ✦  Long-term service contracts & preventive maintenance
  • ✦  Cost-saving analysis & value engineering

What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive mechanical solutions for commercial, industrial, and high-rise developments — anywhere in the country.

Commercial HVAC

End-to-end HVAC solutions for commercial buildings, including design-build, installations, and complex chilled water systems for large-scale NYC developments.

Consulting Services

Strategic consulting including cost analysis, value engineering, budget optimization, and QA/QC oversight for owners, GCs, and building managers.

Mechanical Contracting

Full-scale mechanical construction project management — from planning and procurement through site coordination and final commissioning.

HVAC Repair & Maintenance

Preventive maintenance programs and long-term service contracts that maximize system performance, minimize downtime, and reduce operating costs.

BMS/BAS & Local Controls

Building Management System and Building Automation System integration, programming, and commissioning — ensuring full control and efficiency of all mechanical systems.

Air Quality, Testing & Balancing

Comprehensive air quality assessment, system testing, and air/water balancing services to ensure optimal performance, code compliance, and healthy indoor environments for commercial and industrial facilities.
